professional_summary: Experienced Android Developer with extensive experience designing and building native Android applications and mobile games. Skilled in Kotlin, Java, XML, and modern Android frameworks such as Jetpack Compose and Android Architecture Components. Experienced in healthcare application development and Bluetooth-based device connectivity. Adept at working in Agile environments using project management tools to deliver high-quality, maintainable, and user-centered mobile applications.

responsibilities: Built and maintained the frontend of web based gaming and chat applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
Leveraged Ktor for networking.
Implemented GitLab CI/CD for automated deployment pipelines.
Used Fastlane for build and release automation.
Developed and maintained Android applications using Kotlin, Java, and XML.
Modernized legacy codebases with Jetpack Compose.
Integrated Firebase for analytics, authentication, and cloud-based synchronization.
Refactored and optimized codebases for performance, scalability, and maintainability.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Git and GitHub Actions.
Mentored team members and advocated for clean architecture and coding best practices.
Developed Android applications primarily in Java using Android SDK and XML layouts.
Implemented Bluetooth connectivity for heart rate monitor integration.
Integrated RESTful APIs, SQLite, and JSON for communication and storage.
Applied Material Design standards for improved usability.
Mentored junior developers on coding standards and debugging.
Conducted app performance tuning and implemented unit testing.
Developed Android applications for healthcare and hospice management.
Supported home visits and patient documentation features.
Focused on data security, offline functionality, and synchronization.
Collaborated with product and QA teams to meet healthcare compliance requirements.
Developed Android applications for enterprise and healthcare solutions.
Focused on data integrity and security.
Used Retrofit and Gson for API integration and JSON handling.
Updated applications to comply with newer Android SDK releases.
Led mobile app and game development projects using Android SDK and Corona SDK.
Designed and developed mobile games with smooth performance and intuitive gameplay.
Directed a small development team and defined workflows and coding standards.

featured_projects.overview: Little Ones is a baby sleep and parenting app that provides expert routines, sleep tracking, and personalized advice. It includes a community feed for parents and consultants and a private chat system for direct communication.
key_contributions: Rebuilt major app components using Jetpack Compose and modular architecture.
Developed a social feed supporting posts, comments, and media uploads with real time updates.
Implemented a private chat and messaging system using Firebase Firestore, Realtime Database, and Firebase Authentication.
Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications and engagement.
Collaborated with product and UX teams to ensure a seamless user experience aligned with Material Design 3.

featured_projects.overview: F45 Training is a global fitness platform offering functional training programs. The Android TV application acts as a virtual workout coach displaying exercise sessions and real time performance metrics inside F45 studios.
notes: Enterprise only application developed for F45 studios and internal use.
Not available on the Google Play Store.
key_contributions: Built Android TV applications that display real time workout sessions on large studio screens.
Integrated Bluetooth heart rate monitors for live tracking and performance visualization.
Implemented real time workout synchronization and interactive session displays.
Optimized playback and rendering for high resolution video and continuous operation.
Ensured reliable multi screen synchronization across studio environments.

featured_projects.overview: A healthcare management app used by home health professionals for scheduling, documentation, and compliance tracking.
key_contributions: Built modules for patient data entry, scheduling, and synchronization.
Ensured HIPAA compliance and reliability for field operations.

featured_projects.overview: A quoting and CRM tool for insurance agents to generate and manage client quotes efficiently.
key_contributions: Developed MVVM based modules for scalable architecture.
Integrated RESTful APIs for quote generation and management.
Improved testing and deployment workflows with CI/CD pipelines.

featured_projects.overview: A tilt based physics mobile game featuring fun mechanics and smooth motion controls.
key_contributions: Designed and built the game using Corona SDK (Solar2D) and Lua scripting.
Implemented responsive tilt controls and optimized physics rendering.
Directed a small team and managed the full release cycle from development to QA.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
